top_signals.title: Alibaba leans on AI to drum up subdued '618' shopping festival
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: MSCI Flags Indonesia Information Flow Concerns in Annual Review
top_signals.summary: MSCI Inc. highlighted concerns over investors’ ability to access information in Indonesia’s stock market ahead of a potential downgrade that could further weigh on the world’s worst-performing equities.

top_signals.title: Andy Burnham wins crucial UK by-election
top_signals.summary: Greater Manchester mayor to return to parliament as an MP and be able to challenge Keir Starmer as UK prime minister

top_signals.title: Rio Tinto’s Oyu Tolgoi resumes exports after Mongolia blockade
top_signals.summary: Shipments returned to normal one day after protesters disrupted transport from Mongolia's flagship copper mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Sen. Gillibrand’s son is building a perps exchange that wants dual CFTC, SEC oversight: report
top_signals.summary: The American Perpetuals Exchange Corporation raised $30 million at a $300 million valuation, Fortune reported on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Schipper Takes the Helm of Netherlands Coast Guard
top_signals.summary: The Netherlands Coast Guard has appointed Klaasjan Schipper as its new director, succeeding Nicole Kuipers, who led the organization since 2022.Schipper officially assumed the role on June 17 during a handover ceremony in Den Helder, becoming the tenth director in the Coast Guard's history.

top_signals.title: Wealthsimple launches Kalshi-powered prediction market app for Canadian investors
top_signals.summary: The offering follows regulatory approval earlier this year and comes as prediction markets face legal challenges from regulators, exchanges and policymakers around the world.
